utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 categories. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists physical_health plan name and cost, mental_health plan name and cost, and total health cost. This is fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a specific policy name and a cost. Fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a plan name, a monthly cost, an add-on with daily cost, and a total travel cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists a type and cost. Fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan only includes monthly_cost and omits annual cost; therefore it is not fully specified according to 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' Thus, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final plan and match them exactly to names in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (home content), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance), and 24/7 Travel Assistance listed both as a travel enhancement add-on (per-day) and as an additional service (monthly). The ground truth provides ratings for all these items, including 24/7 Travel Assistance under travel_enhancement_services.
